rationale: The selected commit correctly translates the frontmatter (title and subTitle), which was missing in other versions. It maintains technical accuracy and the author's direct style. The minor typo mentioned in the previous judge report ('Ich hoffe,Ihnen') is actually already correct in the provided MDX text ('Ich hoffe, Ihnen'), so no further suggestions are required.

suggestionLog.replacement: Ich hoffe, Ihnen hat das Testen
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
